nasb.text: Then the woman gave birth to a son and named him Samson; and the child grew up and the Lord blessed him.

esv.text: And the woman bore a son and called his name Samson. And the young man grew, and the Lord blessed him.

cnv.text: 後來那婦人生了一個兒子，她就給他起名叫參孫；孩子漸漸長大了，耶和華賜福給他。

ccb.text: 后来玛挪亚的妻子生了个儿子，她给孩子取名叫参孙。这孩子渐渐长大，耶和华赐福给他。
